scenes.voice_text: GluMira is different from other diabetes apps. It doesn't talk down to you. It gives you real information and lets you do what you want with it.
scenes.visual_note: Dark mode dashboard slides in. Clean, minimal. No clutter.

scenes.voice_text: IOB Hunter shows exactly how much insulin is still active in your body. It's the number that tells you whether a correction is safe right now — or whether you should wait.
scenes.subtitle_text: Active insulin. The number that actually matters.
scenes.visual_note: Clean IOB curve in dark mode. Minimal labels. Clinical feel.

scenes.voice_text: After a week of data, GluMira starts finding patterns — times when your glucose consistently goes high or low. Not guessing. Actual data about your actual body.
scenes.subtitle_text: Patterns from your data. Not guesses.
scenes.visual_note: Dark mode 7-day grid. Recurring clusters highlight. No cheerful graphics — just clean data.

scenes.voice_text: You can choose what your dashboard looks like. Dark mode, which metrics you see first, how alerts work. It's your app.
scenes.visual_note: Dashboard customisation panel. Theme toggle. Widget rearrangement. Feels personal.

scenes.voice_text: When you go to clinic, you can share a report that actually shows what's been going on — instead of trying to explain it from memory.
scenes.subtitle_text: Clinic reports that say what you can't always explain.
scenes.visual_note: Clean report preview. Minimal. Professional. Data-focused.

scenes.voice_text: Let's set it up. Takes about three minutes.
scenes.visual_note: Simple full-screen CTA. Dark background. Single button. No fuss.
